title: grammitis loheriana
intro: Grammitis loheriana, also known as the Philippine liverwort, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Grammitidaceae. It is a small, non-vascular plant that is native to the tropical regions of the Philippines and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and protect against cell damage. The leaves of the Grammitis loheriana plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
